name: Italian Sausage & Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. To microwave spaghetti squash: Prick several times with a fork and place on a microwavable paper towel.
2. Microwave on high for 8 minutes, then turn the squash over.
3. Continue microwaving for 8 to 11 minutes longer or until tender. Let stand for 10 minutes.
4. Preheat oven to 400°F. Prick the spaghetti squash with a fork.
5. Bake for about 1 hour or until tender.
6. Cook sausage and onion in a 10-inch nonstick skillet over medium heat for about 10 minutes, stirring frequently, until the sausage is cooked through. Drain excess fat.
7. Stir in zucchini, parsley, garlic, and basil. Cover and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
8. Add tomatoes and cheese to the skillet. Stir until combined.
9. Cut the spaghetti squash in half and remove the seeds and fibers. Separate the spaghetti-like strands with two forks.
10. Toss the strands with salt and pepper.
11. Serve the sausage mixture over the cooked spaghetti squash. Makes 6 servings.
